creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 155100
ports patch

The attached patches remove the const qualifier from iconv(3) to match POSIX:
http://pubs.opengroup.org/onlinepubs/9699919799/functions/iconv.html

One patch is for the base system and the other for ports.  The ports patch should be tested on FreeBSD 9 (no iconv in base), 10 (iconv in base with const qualifier) and 11 (with patch that removes const).
